title: AI wins have Alphabet poised to become world’s biggest company
description: Over the past year, Alphabet has gone from an artificial intelligence afterthought to the one firm in the market with dominant positions in nearly every aspect of the technology.

title: AI growth pushes Alphabet closer to overtaking Nvidia as world’s biggest company
description: The gap between the two has narrowed considerably over the past six months

title: AI wins have Alphabet poised to become world’s biggest company
description: Nvidia may be the leader in building AI chips, but Google’s parent has a rival product that’s gaining favour

title: TruVideo pushes AI video scoring tool for dealership service teams and expands into aviation and insurance
description: TruVideo's AI Video Quality Score grades inspection footage on clarity and consistency, aiming to speed insurance claims and cut fraud risk. The tool embeds into existing workflows used by auto dealerships and insurers handling first notice of loss.

title: PM-JAY hackathon at IISc develops AI tools to detect fake health insurance claims
description: India's Ayushman Bharat health scheme has blocked fraudulent claims worth Rs 690 crore using AI, as forged records and deepfakes flood its system. It processes 40,000 claims daily for 60 crore beneficiaries.
